role_summary: the internal auditor evaluates internal controls and processes in government departments to  enhance accountability and efficiency.
responsibilities: • conduct i nternal audits of government departments and schemes   • review compliance with financial rules and procedures   • assess internal controls and risk management   • identify control gaps and process improvements   • prepare internal audit reports and recommendations   • follow  up on audit observations and corrective actions
qualifications: • chartered accountant   • knowledge of government auditing and internal control systems   • strong analytical and reporting skills
